candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; more specific than the duplicate total row.
Also matches top-line revenue, but is a total duplicate of the more specific revenue row.
This is COGS, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use as priority list; both rows are identical in preview, with the specific revenue label preferred over the duplicate total row.

candidates.why: Direct production cost line and numerically matches the explicit COGS row.
Component excluding depreciation/amortization, so it understates full COGS.
Explicit COGS label and matches Production Costs numerically.
Inventory asset, not income statement COGS expense.
Only a component of production costs, not full COGS.
Only a component of production costs, not full COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS row rather than components or duplicate-equivalent production cost subtotal.

candidates.why: Valid SG&A overhead component.
Depreciation should be excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS.
Component under Administrative Expenses; prefer parent overhead row instead of subcomponent when parent is populated.
Explicit SG&A row exists, but preview is empty; rules say include it and also closest overhead buckets for coverage.
Amortization should be excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS.

variables.notes: Candidate list missed the important selling overhead row 'Distribution Costs' and did not include the separate R&D line needed for the XSGA-XRD interaction. Per rules, because the explicit 'Selling, General & Admin' row exists but appears mostly empty in preview, included it plus the closest populated overhead buckets. Added 'Research & Development Cost' as well so that if R&D is reported separately outside SG&A, later subtraction of XRD removes it. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Distribution Costs, [Income Statement] Research & Development Cost

candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized development costs, not current-period R&D expense.
Dedicated R&D expense label.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet/intangible asset label, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line selected. Did not use amortization of development projects because that is amortization, not current R&D expense.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; useful fallback if no dedicated interest-expense total is populated.
Dedicated interest expense component, but may omit lease interest and other borrowings.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component only.

variables.notes: Priority list: prefer dedicated total interest-expense labels first, then broad finance expense as fallback, then bank-debt interest if needed.

Balancing row, not an accounting line item.

candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet equation, not equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is provided, so used 'Equity'. MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

Income statement allocation line, not preferred for balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest appears to be reported; 'Equity' equals 'Rep Total Equity & Minority Interest' in preview, supporting MIB=0.
